en.name: SAK-21 7.62x39mm assault Carbine FDE
en.description: The SAK-21 is a modular, purpose-built firearm, developed to meet the demands of special operations forces and professional shooters. It is an American-made variant of the AK-47, based upon the Kalashnikov design, integrating its reliable time-tested internal mechanics with modernized, performance-enhancing features. Designed with a short-stroke piston system optimized for suppressor use, it delivers a distinctive felt-recoil experience. As a multi-caliber platform, it allows users to swap barrel assemblies for different lengths and calibers—7.62x39, 5.56 NATO, and MORE—ensuring adaptability to specific missions or tasks. Additional next-gen enhancements include a last-round bolt hold open (LRBHO) mechanism for faster reloads and empty magazine indication, as well as fully ambidextrous, intuitive controls for seamless operation.

en.name: SAK-21 M-LOK 12.5 inch Handguard
en.description: A 12.5 (317mm) inch M-LOK handguard for the SAK-21 Carbine

en.name: Jmac Custom SAK-21 Stock Adapter
en.description: A stock adapter for the SAK-21 Carbine, designed by Jmac. This adapter allows the use of a wide variety of stocks on the SAK-21, providing enhanced ergonomics and customization options for the user.

en.name: Jmac Custom SAK-21 Fixed Stock FDE
en.description: A fixed stock for the SAK-21 Carbine, designed by Jmac. This stock provides enhanced stability and control for the user. It is a solid, non-adjustable stock option for those who prefer a more traditional feel and improved accuracy when firing the SAK-21.

en.name: Jmac Custom SAK-21 Fixed Stock
en.description: A fixed stock for the SAK-21 Carbine, designed by Jmac. This stock provides enhanced stability and control for the user. It is a solid, non-adjustable stock option for those who prefer a more traditional feel and improved accuracy when firing the SAK-21.

en.name: Meridian Defense AK Pistol Grip FDE
en.description: The Meridian Defense AK Grip is the result of this collaboration. With our extensive hands-on experience with the AK platform and Hogue’s premier overmolding expertise, we’ve produced a grip that meets our highest quality standards.

en.name: Meridian Defense AK Pistol Grip
en.description: The Meridian Defense AK Grip is the result of this collaboration. With our extensive hands-on experience with the AK platform and Hogue’s premier overmolding expertise, we’ve produced a grip that meets our highest quality standards.

en.name: SAK-21 7.62x39mm Flash Hider FDE
en.description: The SAK-21 Flash Hider is a muzzle device designed for the SAK-21 Carbine. It effectively reduces the visible flash produced when firing the weapon, helping to conceal the shooter's position and maintain stealth in low-light conditions. The flash hider also helps to minimize muzzle rise, allowing for better control and faster follow-up shots.
